declared_goal: Integrate a model for customer sentiment classification into the feedback analysis system.
declared_plan: Create a script to read and preprocess customer reviews data
Train a sentiment classification model with the prepared dataset
Deploy the model as a web service for live sentiment assessment
Set up monitoring and logging for model accuracy and input quality
Connect the web service with the pre-existing feedback analysis dashboard

trajectory.thought: Creating a script to read and preprocess customer reviews data.
